data.query: What caused policy 25CY00134567 to be declined?
data.reference: Policy 25CY00134567 (CryptoVault Exchange, Cyber Liability) was declined because: cryptocurrency exchanges are on the excluded industries list, a hot wallet compromise in 2024 resulted in $18M customer fund loss, fragmented regulatory status across 12 states with no federal charter, and 70% hot wallet ratio exceeds acceptable risk parameters.

data.query: Why was the Vanguard Capital D&O declined?
data.reference: Policy 25DO00156789 (Vanguard Capital Partners, D&O) was declined due to: active parallel DOJ and SEC investigations for accounting fraud, CEO and CFO personally named in shareholder derivative suit, debt-to-equity ratio of 4.8:1 indicating severe financial distress, and auditor going concern opinion confirming insolvency risk.
